_note: 现任主帅;换帅经 --set 更新(旧任压进 history,只增不改)。下游:match_header 主帅行。
brief: Sébastien Desabre, 49, French manager since 2006, appointed DR Congo coach in 2022. Led team to 2023 Afcon semi-finals and 2026 World Cup qualification (first since 1974). Uses flexible 4-1-4-1/4-3-3 formations, defensive organization, high work rate; features Premier League-experienced players like Aaron Wan-Bissaka. Prior African experience: Uganda (2017-2019), Wydad AC, Esperance de Tunis. World Cup Group K: Portugal, Colombia, Uzbekistan. Key players: Yoane Wissa (20 goals for Brentford in 2024/25) and Cedric Bakambu.

coach_xverify.discrepancy: Squawka声称Dean Smith是主教练（2天前），但FIFA、Al Jazeera和维基种子均确认Sébastien Desabre。Squawka的信息可能错误、过时或混淆了其他球队；FIFA作为最权威来源已明确Desabre带队征战2026世界杯。
